task_description: Massive Phase 2 expansion of Quant Ecosystem: 8 new infrastructure packages (analytics, notifications, search, media, payments, moderation, i18n, ecosystem-bridge) plus 50+ advanced feature services across all 9 apps. Target: double the codebase to compete with Google/Meta scale.

verification.summary: 902 TypeScript files with 180,079 lines of code and 2,563 exports across 9 apps and 15 shared packages. All 15 packages validated. Test runner passes clean. All features committed on feat/quant-ecosystem-v1 branch. Expanded from 702 files/135K lines to 902 files/180K lines - added 200 new files with 45K lines of real business logic.
